text.title: Business Model Research Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals onto a conclusion that references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: run full Canvas + P10/P50/P90 + stress tests

example.trace: shape=pre_spec_or_pivot -> comparables=4 -> run full Canvas -> ltv-cap-60-months applied -> P10 verdict=viable-with-fixes.

text.example: Worked path from root-question to conclusion.
